blended.narrative: Loveland is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 9.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 9" over the past week. Current depth: 43".
